description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent hip roof and a modern, boxy design. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with large windows arranged in vertical strips and horizontal bands, providing ample natural light. Balconies and open corridors are visible on the upper floor, with railings and some pink accent elements. The house sits on a rectangular base with a long, paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The entryway is understated, lacking a porch but featuring a direct approach from the walkway. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large windows, balconies, and a long paved walkway leading to the entrance. The design is clean and contemporary with light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, long walkway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical window strips, balconies, and the extended walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying open balconies, pink accent railings, and more window details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with fewer windows and a clear view of the walkway extending from the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Direct entry with a long paved walkway, no porch, minimalistic modern style
